name: Boston Chicken Macaroni & Cheese - Gloria Pitzer
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Velveeta cheese, light or cubed small
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the milk in the top of a double boiler over gently simmering water.
2. Add the Velveeta cheese, musturad mustard powder, turmeric, salt, and pepper to the milk, stirring occasionally until melted and smooth.
3. Stir the cooked pasta into the hot cheese mixture and keep warm until serving time over hot water, up to an hour. If it thickens too much, dilute with a little more milk.
4. Serve 6-8 side servings or 4 main-dish servings.
